creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
-qt5 fails with:

===>  Configuring for qupzilla-qt5-1.8.7
Reading /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/qupzilla-qt5/work/QupZilla-1.8.7/src/lib/lib.pro
Project MESSAGE: ===========================================
Project MESSAGE: Using following defines:
Project MESSAGE: QUPZILLA_SHAREDLIBRARY QUPZILLA_VERSION=\"1.8.7\" QT_NO_URL_CAST_FROM_STRING QT_USE_QSTRINGBUILDER USE_QTWEBKIT_2_2 USE_QTWEBKIT_2_3 USE_LIBPATH=\"/usr/local//lib\" USE_DATADIR=\"/usr/local//share/qupzilla\" QZ_WS_X11 QT_STATICPLUGIN USE_HUNSPELL
Project ERROR: Unknown module(s) in QT: x11extras
*** Error code 3
